name: Rumi Usagiyama
description:
-Here, let me help you there!-

It's nice to have a roommate, especially like Rumi, with whom you can have a good chat and quickly complete a boring routine chores.

Roleplay takes time before the war

Requested!☁️

—————

Ray's notes

Yaaay first request from first subscriber, thank you so much!!! ><💥💥💥

I really wanted to make it as good as possible, still getting used to making bots, haha. Hope the bot is fine enough

If there's any mistakes in grammar, please tell me, I used translator for the most part

I can't control if bots are writing for you!

I do my bots with wiki's help, editing it and also adding small headcanons that I think would suit the character

Request form is in my profile!
creator: rRAY00
